overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player crosses wet streets, walks under a massive curved elevated walkway with dynamic LED lighting, and observes futuristic architecture and passing elevated trains in a hazy, atmospheric environment.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rainy cyberpunk intersection at night. The camera crosses a broad yellow-striped crosswalk while pedestrians with umbrellas pass by. A large Nicola soda billboard dominates the background, and palm trees line the foggy street.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a busy road, approaching a large elevated structure in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a multi-lane road, the camera approaches a massive elevated highway structure in the foggy distance. Street lamps cast light through the haze while a distant pedestrian with a red umbrella walks ahead.

LED lights on the elevated structure shift colors from rainbow patterns to green and red stripes

agents.ego_description: walking beneath a massive curved structure with vibrant changing LED lights overhead

entered.detail: curved elevated pedestrian walkway with dynamic rainbow LED strips on its underside that change colors
tall vertical digital advertisement screens on dark building facades
dark skyscrapers with scattered illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The camera walks beneath a massive curved elevated walkway covered in dynamic LED strips that shift through rainbow colors. The environment becomes semi-sheltered as tall office buildings rise on the left, and the lighting takes on a vibrant neon quality from the overhead display.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection beneath elevated train tracks with passing monorail

events.description: elevated monorail train passes overhead from left to right
crosses the street beneath the elevated train track

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while an elevated train passes overhead on the track above

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the wet road with headlights on

entered.detail: futuristic monorail train with orange accents moving along elevated track
tall pole with traffic signals and directional arrow signs
illuminated street signs with directional arrows including Santo Domingo

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses another wet intersection as a futuristic elevated train passes overhead on its track. Traffic lights and directional signs guide vehicles, while a black car drives past on the left. The colorful LED walkway recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching traffic barrier with no entry zone

events.description: approaches traffic barrier with red illuminated no entry sign

agents.ego_description: walking along the road toward a traffic barrier and no entry zone

entered.detail: red illuminated no entry sign and barrier gate blocking the road
futuristic cars parked along the curb including a dark sedan
small structure with red and white striped barriers

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking along a street toward a red no-entry barrier. Parked vehicles line the right side while traffic control structures and signs dominate the view. The elevated train track remains visible on the left as the approach to the barrier completes the journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk city, moving from an open, neon-lit intersection into the shelter of a massive architectural structure before emerging back into the urban traffic. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath a towering Nicola soda billboard and foggy palm trees, then proceeds along a wet sidewalk toward a looming elevated highway in the distance. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts beneath a massive curved walkway where dynamic rainbow LED strips cast vibrant colors over the surrounding office buildings. The perspective then opens back up to another wet intersection as a futuristic elevated train passes overhead and a black car drives by, leaving the colorful lights behind. Finally, the camera advances along a street lined with parked vehicles, passing under the train tracks before coming to a halt at a red no-entry barrier.
